name: Alibaba Cloud DevOps MCP Server
what_it_does: Official Alibaba Cloud DevOps MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Alibaba Cloud's DevOps platform — managing code repositories (Codeup), triggering pipeline builds and deployments, accessing project management features, querying CI/CD job status, and integrating Alibaba Cloud's DevOps capabilities into agent-driven software delivery workflows for China-focused cloud deployments.
use_cases: Managing Alibaba Cloud Codeup repositories from code management agents
Triggering and monitoring CI/CD pipeline runs from deployment agents
Querying project tasks and sprint progress from project management agents
Accessing build artifacts and deployment records from audit agents
Automating Alibaba Cloud DevOps workflows from infrastructure agents
Integrating China-region cloud DevOps into global agent workflows from multi-cloud agents
not_for: Teams not using Alibaba Cloud DevOps (use GitHub, GitLab, or Azure DevOps MCPs)
Non-China cloud deployments without Alibaba Cloud infrastructure
Teams requiring data residency outside China for compliance
best_when: A team using Alibaba Cloud DevOps (common in China-based companies) needs AI-driven pipeline management — official MCP with full Alibaba Cloud DevOps API coverage.
avoid_when: You use AWS CodePipeline, Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions, or other DevOps platforms — this is Alibaba Cloud specific.

auth.notes: Alibaba Cloud AccessKey ID and Secret required. Configure via environment variables. Use RAM (Resource Access Management) for least-privilege access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Alibaba Cloud DevOps: free tier for small teams with limited pipelines
pricing.paid_tiers: Pay-as-you-go or subscription for larger teams
pricing.notes: Alibaba Cloud DevOps has a free tier. MCP server is free. Production use requires Alibaba Cloud account with billing.

performance.rate_limits: Alibaba Cloud API: throttling applies; check specific API quota for DevOps

known_agent_gotchas: Alibaba Cloud documentation is primarily in Chinese — English docs may lag behind
AccessKey must use RAM with minimal required permissions — root account keys are dangerous
China-region data residency — all DevOps data in China; may not comply with GDPR or other regulations
Alibaba Cloud API rate limits can be strict — implement exponential backoff
Official MCP from aliyun org — well-maintained for the ecosystem
Organization ID required for most API calls — find in Alibaba Cloud console
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. AccessKey auth — use RAM with minimal permissions. China data residency. Store credentials as environment variables. Official Alibaba Cloud MCP.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. RAM with minimal permissions. China data residency. Store credentials as env vars. Official Alibaba Cloud MCP.
